Set fryer to ~350°F and blister tomatoes until skin can be peeled off.
Remove tomatoes, peel and cut into quarters.  Discard skins and seeds, leaving all tomato flesh
Toss tomato quartes with salt, sugar, garlic, thyme, black pepper and oil.
Line sheet trays with resting racks and place tomatoes on racks.
In convection oven set to ~225°F low fan, bake tomatoes until dehydrated with light colour on endes ~2 hours
Rotate every half hour.
Remove from sheet trays and cool in a blast chiller.
Reserve in quart containers in the cooler.
